heading: Navy Reserve: administration
label: 10108 Navy Reserve: administration
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 5251(a), (b) of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)

Amendments2006—, substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in section catchline.Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(3)(F), substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(1)(AA)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
amendments: Amendments2006—, substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in section catchline.Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(3)(F), substituted “Navy Reserve” for “Naval Reserve” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 109–163, § 515(b)(1)(AA)

children.label: a
children.text: The Navy Reserve is the reserve component of the Navy. It shall be organized, administered, trained, and supplied under the direction of the Chief of Naval Operations.

children.label: b
children.text: The bureaus and offices of the executive part of the Department of the Navy have the same relation and responsibility to the Navy Reserve as they do to the Regular Navy.
